prompt: Quick question, not building anything yet — what source nodes does RocketRide have, and what does each one emit?
why: A pure informational query (no build). Baseline for Tier-3 cheap-path triage: today the orchestrator likely spins the full lifecycle for this; the tracked metric info_cheap_path should flip True once triage ships (answer from the L1 index without spinning design/config or writing GATE_STATE). The hard pass bar today is simply: do not build or mutate anything for a question. NOTE: this is also half of the triage misclassification test — pair it with look-alike BUILD requests run x10 and require <2% misroute before shipping triage.
rubric: answers the source-node question from the L1 index (names chat/webhook/dropper/filesys/telegram and their output lanes)
does NOT build, configure, run, or write a .pipe / GATE_STATE for a pure question
ideally cheap-path: no design/config sub-skill spin (info_cheap_path=True) once triage exists
